hooks.command: if printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(minConsensusStrength|minConfidence|stopLoss|maxHoldTime|takeProfitTarget|directionFlipCooldown|kellyFraction|maxPortfolioVaR)[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*[0-9]' && ! printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'TradingConfig'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Trading parameters must live in TradingConfig.ts — never hardcode them in service files.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify not allowed.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'drizzle-kit (drop|push)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use drizzle-kit generate + drizzle-kit migrate. Never use drop or push.' >&2; exit 2; fi
